name: visisonor_loop
_doc: The canonical visi-sonor INSTANCE of the Sensor->Logic->Action interaction format (Dreams-arc Slice 7). A signal/camera frame (a frequency-band energy) is injected via GraphRuntime.set_input_frame -> read by an Input SOURCE (the read side of the portability seam, landed F2) -> a BRAIN of Compare+Select (landed) maps band energy against a threshold to a COLOUR -> a WorldAction fires device.set_led with the mapped {r,g,b}. device.* is registered by the HOST at boot (DeviceActions.register_device_ops); a host with no LED still runs this same arrangement, device.set_led falling through WorldActions' unknown-op declared-no-op. NO Sensor primitive (that is a parallel slice) — the landed Input source reads the injected frame directly.
